daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but electric rn. The cosmos wants you to lean into your natural magnetism—people are feeling it. Trust the calm confidence radiating from you today.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability hits different right now. Single? Someone's been noticing your energy. Either way, let your guard down just a little. Connection is calling.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight today. This is the moment to speak up in that meeting or pitch what's been brewing. The universe is backing your initiative—move with intention.
daily.health: Your body's asking for slowness. Stretching, walking, or just sitting with tea matters more than intense workouts rn. Listen to what feels restorative, not punishing.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are shifting your perspective this week, Taurus. You're feeling more curious and less stuck in your ways—lean into that energy. There's potential brewing beneath the surface, even if it's not obvious yet.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, meaningful conversations are on the menu. If you're single, someone's noticing your quiet confidence. Either way, authenticity is your biggest flex right now. Don't overthink the small stuff.
weekly.career: You're entering a phase where your work output speaks louder than usual. Small wins are building momentum. Trust the process and stay patient with projects that haven't come through yet—timing matters.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement this week. Whether that's a walk, stretching, or something more active, listen to what feels good. Energy levels feel steady if you prioritize rest too.
